questionHtml: Outline how stem cells develop into specialized cells during development of the embryo.
markschemeHtml:
1. (by a process called) cell differentiation;
  2. different genes are expressed/ switched on;
  3. different concentrations of signaling molecules/ molecules determine position of cells in embryo;

meta.title: Outline how stem cells develop into specialized cells during development of the embryo.
breadcrumbLabels: B2.3.1. Production of unspecialized cells following fertilization and their development into specialized cells by differentiation
